summary: Completed a verified adapter-backed demo path from persisted Aletheia matter/work-product data into AgentOps artifacts. The matter-scoped Command Center now fetches a live Aletheia matter, adapts Evidence -> Issue/Risk -> Memo -> Review -> Gate -> Audit -> Eval, exposes gate-backed typed_handoff_provenance in the audit export package, previews the handoff payload, and downloads the full JSON export.
contractsChanged: GateResult to persisted Aletheia provenance map
buildAuditPack optional typed handoff provenance options
buildExportPackage optional typed handoff provenance options
Matter-scoped Command Center adapter-backed export package summary
Matter-scoped Command Center export package JSON download
Matter-scoped Command Center typed handoff payload preview
Focused adapter-backed route Playwright export package preview/download coverage
testsRun: cd frontend && npx eslint src/aletheia/RemoteMatterCommandCenter.tsx src/aletheia/agentops/exportPackage.ts src/aletheia/agentops/handoff.ts tests/aletheia-agentops-route.spec.ts tests/agentops/exportPackage.test.ts tests/agentops/handoff.test.ts

cd frontend && rm -rf /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests && npx tsc -p tests/agentops/tsconfig.adapter.json && node --test /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/adapters.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/handoff.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/exportPackage.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/skillsEval.test.js

cd frontend && rm -rf .next-ui-smoke test-results/aletheia-ui-smoke-state.json && if [ -d test-results ]; then find test-results -maxdepth 1 -name 'aletheia-agentops-route-*' -exec rm -rf {} +; fi && npx playwright test tests/aletheia-agentops-route.spec.ts --project=desktop-chromium

cd frontend && rm -rf .next-ui-smoke test-results/aletheia-ui-smoke-state.json && if [ -d test-results ]; then find test-results -maxdepth 1 -name 'aletheia-agentops-route-*' -exec rm -rf {} +; fi && npx playwright test tests/aletheia-agentops-route.spec.ts --project=mobile-chromium
risks: Adapter is frontend/view-model only; it does not persist AgentOps artifacts as source-of-truth records.
Generic /aletheia/agentops still defaults to sampleAgentOpsWorkspace; the adapter-backed product path is matter-scoped under /aletheia/matters/[matterId]/agentops.
The AgentOps snapshot is an audit observation over existing Aletheia records; it is not a new source-of-truth AgentOps persistence model.
Gate Provenance is read-only mapping from displayed gate results back to persisted checkpoints, validations, reviews, and audit events.
Export package consumers must tolerate the additive AuditPack.typed_handoff_provenance and manifest.handoff_provenance_items fields.
Desktop and mobile Chromium route smoke cover the adapter-backed export package panel; WebKit/Firefox responsive behavior remains unverified.
Operator health may still report dirty worktree warnings from parallel feature-agent work; split commits before handoff.
